meaning: n.濂崇敤鍥村肪,濂崇敤棰嗗肪
examples: The research on collarette contour extraction and iris map overlap is of great importance to computer-aided iridiagnosis technologies.
To solve the problems of collarette extraction in the computer-aided iridology system, a method for collarette extraction based on the max sum of gray gradient is proposed.
